summary.boundary: Overview only; it separates evidence gaps from administrative blockers and does not alter manuscript claims.

rows.why_it_matters: Near-threshold breakthrough should not rely on one formal seed.
rows.next_action: No further repeat action; keep manuscript wording bounded to stochastic variability.
rows.evidence_boundary: Repeat-seed uncertainty can enter the manuscript only after at least three formal processed rows are available.

rows.current_status: valid_pressure_cases=3, strict_pressure_cases=3, engineering_screening_cases=3, manuscript_ready=True, unique_flow_geometries=3, geometry_distinguishable=True; return_audit=pressure_evidence_ready_for_author_review; warnings=1
rows.why_it_matters: Pressure-flow response is the strongest missing layer for hydraulic consequence.
rows.next_action: Pressure evidence is complete for the current handoff; keep wording bounded and do not rerun unless the geometry changes.
rows.evidence_boundary: No OpenFOAM pressure claim until returned archive is imported and evidence gate passes.

rows.why_it_matters: The manuscript is credible only if it stays in the pre-clogging numerical-mechanism scope.
rows.next_action: Keep critical-transition, pressure-calibrated and experimental-imaging claims out of title, abstract, figures and conclusions.
rows.evidence_boundary: Boundary language is a claim-control requirement, not new evidence.

rows.why_it_matters: Benchmarking should show comparable trends and boundaries, not force replication of the reference paper.
rows.next_action: Keep benchmark crosswalk and response-ready evidence maps synchronized after new repeat or pressure evidence.
rows.evidence_boundary: Benchmark positioning is scoped comparison, not experimental validation.

rows.why_it_matters: The paper cannot be submitted until repository and author metadata are confirmed.
rows.next_action: Resolve DOI/accession, funding, competing interests, acknowledgements and corresponding-author metadata.
rows.evidence_boundary: Administrative readiness does not change scientific evidence.
